scope: N3D audit-before-coding: select the cross-lane (or other) reduction target from N2's hottest dynamic stall PC
blocker: N2 (AMD_ISA_PHASE_N2_PASS_DEGRADED_TIMING_ATTRIBUTION) produced occupancy + wave-residency timing only, NOT a per-PC stall table. The vendored rocprof-trace-decoder (0.1.6) returns wave events with instructions_size==0; a prior dedicated effort (bench/amd-scheduler-tooling-backend) hit ATT_DECODER_REPAIR_BLOCKED and ROCPROFILER_ATT_MISSING_PROFILED_HSA_AQL_PATH_IN_HCQ -- per-instruction ATT decode is not achievable through tinygrad's HCQ submission path. The other vendored .so's are symlinks to librocprofiler-sdk / libatt_plugin, not the trace decoder.

n3d_audit_fields.which_reduce_path_score_softmax_pv_or_ga: UNRESOLVED -- cannot attribute without per-PC stall
n3d_audit_fields.owned_cross_lane_comparison: static only: N0 cross_lane owned=5 native=5 (equal count); placement/shape diff not measurable dynamically

occupancy.note: equal occupancy -> not occupancy-bound (consistent with Phase M)

static.note: native does LESS static work yet waves live ~16-26x longer -> latency/stall-bound

best_available_evidence.prior_block_tile_sqtt_hint: extra/qk_decode_block_tile_sqtt_capture.py docstring: per-token ds_bpermute reduce latency EXPOSED (281 vs 22 cyc/token) -- SUGGESTIVE of cross-lane, but NOT a per-PC confirmation
best_available_evidence.conclusion: native is per-wave latency/stall-bound at equal occupancy; the STALL CATEGORY (VMEM vs LDS vs waitcnt vs cross-lane) is UNRESOLVED. Cannot legally select N3D (or N3A/N3B/N3C) without category-level attribution.

discipline: N3 branch selection requires a PC/stall row (user rule). The ds_bpermute hint is not sufficient -> implementing a cross-lane rewrite now would be premature and is rejected.

feasible_unblock.path: N2.1 category-level attribution via tinygrad NATIVE PMC (PMC ContextVar -> pmc_start writes SQ_PERFCOUNTER registers directly via HCQ; NO rocprof/HSA-AQL dependency, so it BYPASSES the ATT decoder wall).
feasible_unblock.counters_to_capture: SQ wait/stall + issue counters split by unit: e.g. SQ_WAIT_INST_VMEM / SQ_WAIT_INST_LDS / SQ_WAIT_ANY (waitcnt+mem stall), SQ_INSTS_VMEM / SQ_INSTS_LDS, VALU/SALU busy, GL2C/TCC for L2/mem traffic, LDS bank-conflict proxy. Compare owned vs native per-kernel to pin the dominant stall unit.
feasible_unblock.then: category -> N3A (VMEM/coalescing) | N3B (LDS/bank) | N3C (waitcnt/load-use) | N3D (cross-lane) | N3D-overlap
